creator: vince@unsane.co.uk
text:
looks like this started at r328885. I'll try and look a bit closer when i get time.

I am building using poudriere in a 9.1 and 8.4 amd64 jail. 
Log of the failed build available at http://unsane.co.uk/fbsd/apr-1.4.8.1.5.2.log
This should contain any required config or environment information but let me know if you need more provided.

How-To-Repeat: try and build devel/apr1 with the option MYSQL=on and with WITH_MYSQL_VER=55m in make.conf
